weather: Cold rain leaning sideways and making every bus window look dirtier than usual.
transit: Victoria line platform packed early and one Overground train cancelled without explanation.
socialPattern: Pret line full of damp coats and people pretending they are not furious yet.
localEvent: Midweek football crowd expected near one cluster of pubs tonight.
pressurePoint: Coffee prices keep climbing past the point where anyone can joke about it.
softDetail: Pub carpet smell leaking into the morning from last night.

weather: Dry cold with sharp sun that makes everyone overdress wrong.
transit: Ringbahn delays stacking and one tram full of people holding bouquets like they forgot a shared deadline.
socialPattern: Cafe tables split evenly between laptops, strollers, and somebody correcting somebody else's German.
localEvent: A gallery opening tonight is already producing the wrong kind of tote bag at lunch.
pressurePoint: People are arguing again about whether a new cafe means the block is gone or just annoying.
softDetail: Spati fridges humming louder than the street for a minute.

weather: Fog stayed late and then lifted just enough to make everyone overdress for the wrong microclimate.
transit: Muni ghost arrivals and a stalled escalator pushing people into an ugly patience test.
socialPattern: Coffee shops full of founder calls, job-search tabs, and one person openly crying into a breakfast sandwich.
localEvent: Giants home game will push extra crowd into bars near game time.
pressurePoint: Six dollar coffee now somehow counts as restraint if the Wi-Fi works.
softDetail: Corner store cat asleep under a stack of electrolyte drinks.

weather: Bright sun with enough wind to make the beach look useful but not comfortable.
transit: Metro line 3 warmer than outside and full of suitcase wheels before lunch.
socialPattern: Brunch places already divided between locals moving fast and visitors performing a long morning.
localEvent: A weekend market setup is already squeezing one square into tourist choreography.
pressurePoint: Another tiny cafe switched from cheap coffee to polished matcha and everyone noticed immediately.
softDetail: One old man started arguing about football before noon and the block relaxed around him.
